gauge.name: Sabine River near Beckville

impacts.statement: Severe flooding will continue for the next several days. Thousands of acres of land near the river will flood.
Expect moderate to severe flooding of the lowland floodplain for the next several days.

Expect considerable lowland flooding on the reach of the Sabine River from the Tatum through Beckville and DeBerry areas with flooded boat ramps, gas and petroleum wells, and even some low area cabins.
Expect lowland flooding of the heavily wooded floodplain. In addition, oil field operations in and near the floodplain will be affected and steps should be taken to secure petroleum equipment.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
